generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance JointAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures joint angles of the gantry crane with high precision for kinematic analysis. Part of the crane's actuator feedback system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors motor current draw to detect anomalies, overloads, or energy consumption patterns in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PayloadPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks the 3D position of the suspended payload using encoders or IMUs for trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PayloadPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures linear and angular acceleration of crane components to detect vibrations or dynamic anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance ControllerInputLogger : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Logs raw control signals (PWM, torque commands) sent to actuators for closed-loop validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerInputDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Optional sensor for ambient conditions (temperature, humidity) affecting crane operation in lab environments."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance JointAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointAngleEncoder
    base:desc "High-frequency (100Hz+) joint angle data transmitted via MQTT to the TimescaleDB database for synchronization."
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time motor current measurements sent via ROS topics or MQTT for energy consumption analysis."
]

instance PayloadPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PayloadPositionSensor
    base:desc "3D payload position data streamed at 100Hz+ for trajectory validation against digital twin predictions."
]

instance CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
    base:desc "Acceleration data transmitted for vibration analysis and dynamic constraint enforcement."
]

instance ControllerInputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerInputLogger
    base:desc "Raw control signals logged at execution frequency for closed-loop validation and fault detection."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
    base:desc "Optional environmental data transmitted for contextual analysis of crane performance."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation using Denavit-Hartenberg parameters for forward/inverse kinematics calculations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicSimulationEnabler, TrajectoryPlanningEnabler
]

instance CraneDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based model simulating crane dynamics (forces, torques, energy) using PyBullet or ROS simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicValidationEnabler, EnergyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ControlAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements PID/MPC controllers with SciPy/CasADi for trajectory optimization under constraints."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClosedLoopControlEnabler, AdaptiveControlEnabler
]

instance HistoricalOperationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series logs of crane operations (joint angles, payloads, control parameters) stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, PayloadPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAnalysisEnabler
]

instance RealTimeStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live sensor data streamed at 100Hz+ for real-time synchronization between physical and digital systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted, CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted, ControllerInputDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler
]

instance ExperimentalMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tagged metadata associating logs with experimental conditions (payload mass, control algorithm version)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalConditionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo QueryableStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance KinematicSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Uses PyBullet/PyRobot to simulate crane kinematics for trajectory planning and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryPlanningService
]

instance DynamicValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compares physical sensor data with simulated dynamics to detect model drift or anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ClosedLoopControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes PID/MPC controllers in real-time with SciPy/CasADi for adaptive control parameter tuning."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ClosedLoopValidationService
]

instance DataAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes historical logs with SQL queries for trend analysis, wear-and-tear patterns, and anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders 2D/3D CAD overlays and time-series plots using Plotly Dash or ROS RViz for interactive monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, SideBySideComparisonService
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates collision-free, time-optimal paths using CVXPY/Gurobi under hard/soft constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ConstraintHandlingService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements residual analysis and automated alerts for discrepancies between physical and digital states."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, ModelAdaptationService
]

instance QueryableStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables SQL-based filtering of historical logs with metadata tagging for experimental reproducibility."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance EnergyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizes crane motion trajectories to minimize energy consumption while enforcing safety constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance AdaptiveControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamically adjusts control parameters based on real-time performance metrics and model updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables ClosedLoopValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements model-based control algorithms (PID/MPC) to optimize crane motion trajectories, minimize energy consumption, and enforce safety constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, EnergyEfficiencyAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Captures time-series data from the physical crane (joint angles, motor currents, payload position) with automated timestamping and metadata tagging."
    DTDFVocab:provides LongTermBehaviorInsight, ExperimentalConditionInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and retrospective visualizations of crane state, including 2D/3D CAD overlays and time-series plots."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight, ValidationComparisonInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements real-time synchronization between physical and digital systems to detect discrepancies (model drift, sensor noise, actuator failures)."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemSynchronizationInsight, DiscrepancyAlertAction
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates collision-free, time-optimal paths for the crane's payload while respecting kinematic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides CollisionFreePathInsight, TimeOptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ConstraintHandlingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enforces hard limits (max payload, joint velocity) and soft constraints (smooth motion profiles) during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConstraintComplianceInsight, SafetyEnforcementAction
]

instance ClosedLoopValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares digital predictions with physical execution to adapt control parameters dynamically."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight, ParameterAdaptationAction
]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects deviations in sensor data (unexpected vibrations, joint misalignment) using statistical process control or machine learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, FaultAlertAction
]

instance ModelAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates the digital twin's kinematic parameters (e.g., joint friction coefficients) using online learning from physical feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateInsight, ParameterRefinementAction
]

instance SideBySideComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Overlays physical sensor data with digital twin predictions for validation and debugging."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationComparisonInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated collision-free, time-optimal motion trajectories for the crane payload."
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts crane motion to minimize energy consumption while maintaining performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LongTermBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analyzed trends in crane operation over time to identify wear-and-tear patterns."
]

instance ExperimentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Retrieved logs filtered by experimental conditions (e.g., payload 5kg) for reproducible analysis."
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 2D/3D visualization of crane state with zoom, pan, and annotation capabilities."
]

instance AnomalyHighlightingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Color-coded alerts for deviations in crane operation (vibrations, misalignment)."
]

instance SystemSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization status between physical and digital crane systems."
]

instance DiscrepancyAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers warnings when residuals exceed predefined thresholds (±2% error margin)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CollisionFreePathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validated collision-free path planning for crane payload movement."
]

instance TimeOptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes time-optimal trajectories while respecting constraints."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConstraintComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitored compliance with hard/soft constraints during crane operation."
]

instance SafetyEnforcementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enforced safety limits (payload, velocity) in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison results between digital predictions and physical execution."
]

instance ParameterAdaptationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamically adjusted control parameters based on validation feedback."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies in sensor data (vibrations, misalignment)."
]

instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generated alerts for detected faults or deviations from nominal operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated kinematic parameters (friction coefficients) based on physical feedback."
]

instance ParameterRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refined model parameters using online learning techniques."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true

instance ValidationComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Side-by-side comparison of physical sensor data and digital twin predictions."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the **Digital Twin** to the **Physical Crane** are mediated by the **Control Application**, which uses the **Physical Crane Interface** to send commands to the crane's controllers. Command types include trajectory execution directives generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, optimized to eliminate residual swinging motion. Control messages are formatted as kinematic trajectories (e.g., joint trajectories, velocity profiles) and transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface**. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not explicitly described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** ensures executed trajectories match simulations within acceptable thresholds, triggering operator alerts via the **Dashboard** if discrepancies exceed limits. Feedback systems rely on real-time state data logged by the **Logging Application**, enabling closed-loop control. Conflict resolution is not detailed, but the **MQTT Broker** suggests asynchronous messaging, potentially mitigating synchronization issues. Command execution confirmation is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**'s comparison of simulated vs. actual trajectories."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents follow a **lightweight, ad-hoc orchestration pattern** without reliance on commercial frameworks. Key components include:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB (time-series database)** for data storage, **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for communication, and **virtual machines** for deployment. The system emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral synchronization** between the physical greenhouse and its digital twin but lacks explicit orchestration protocols.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Implements a **Microsoft Azure-based pipeline** with **AutomationML** for model-driven engineering. The digital twin supports **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction**, but orchestration details are abstracted behind Azure tools. The **Raspberry Pi** acts as the physical system interface, while the digital twin runs in a cloud/edge hybrid setup.
  - **Gantry Crane**: Described using **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, suggesting a **modular, containerized approach** (implied by the broader exemplar discussion). No specific orchestration framework (e.g., Kubernetes, service mesh) is mentioned, indicating a **manual or scripted integration** of components.
  **Resource management** is handled via **virtualization/containerization** (e.g., VMs, Raspberry Pi), while **system-wide coordination** relies on ad-hoc message brokers (ActiveMQ) or cloud services (Azure)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models** with **prerecorded data** in VMs to validate baseline performance, though explicit validation methods (e.g., cross-validation, benchmarking) are not specified. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **model-driven engineering** for digital twins, with applications in **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction**, suggesting iterative validation via **real-time data comparison** and **Azure-based analytics**. Uncertainty sources (e.g., sensor noise, model drift) are not quantified, nor are error correction mechanisms detailed. The **ad-hoc approach** in both exemplars implies reliance on **manual verification** rather than formal validation frameworks, with quality assurance tied to **containerized deployment** and **reproducibility** via GitHub-hosted documentation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin**'s technical network infrastructure relies on an **MQTT Broker** for inter-service communication, ensuring lightweight, publish-subscribe messaging between containers (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**). The network topology is not explicitly defined, but the **TimescaleDB database** and **Grafana Dashboard** suggest a centralized architecture with services communicating over a local or dedicated network. Bandwidth and latency requirements are unspecified, though real-time trajectory validation implies low-latency constraints for the **Continuous Validation Service**. Redundancy mechanisms are not mentioned, but the **MQTT Broker**'s role in signaling implies fault tolerance for critical services. Security protocols are not detailed, though the use of a **Database** and **Dashboard** suggests authentication/authorization for operator access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin** is deployed as a set of six containers (per the C4 Model) hosted on an unspecified platform, with no explicit mention of cloud/edge/on-premise. The **TimescaleDB database** and **MQTT Broker** imply on-premise or edge deployment due to real-time data requirements. Computational demands are driven by the **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematics modeling) and **Simulation Service** (physics-based simulation), while storage scales with logged crane states in **TimescaleDB**. Scalability mechanisms are not described, but the modular container architecture (e.g., **Dashboard**, **Logging Application**) suggests horizontal scaling potential. Availability/reliability assurances are implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**'s threshold-based alerts, though no redundancy or failover strategies are specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit **limited horizontal integration** with external systems, relying on **domain-specific or proprietary solutions**:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for internal data flow but lacks explicit interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT). No mention of enterprise system integration (e.g., ERP, MES).
  - **Air Quality Management**: Uses **AutomationML** for model-driven digital twin representation, enabling **standardized data exchange** within construction engineering contexts. **Microsoft Azure tools** facilitate cloud-based integration but do not detail protocols for external system dependencies. The **Raspberry Pi sensors** interface with the digital twin via unspecified protocols.
  - **Gantry Crane**: No external system integration details are provided. The **C4 Model** suggests a **self-contained architecture**, though the broader exemplar discussion implies **containerization** (e.g., Docker) for dissemination, which could enable loose coupling with other microservices.
  **Dependencies** are minimal and tailored to the exemplar’s domain (e.g., agriculture, construction). **Interoperability standards** are only explicitly mentioned for **AutomationML** in the Air Quality Management case. **Integration patterns** are ad-hoc, with no reference to federated Digital Twin networks or enterprise-wide data sharing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **partial standardization** with the following compliance and interoperability elements:
  - **Industry Standards**:
    - **AutomationML**: The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** for DT modeling, a standard for engineering data exchange in automation systems (IEC 62714).
    - **No Commercial Frameworks**: The exemplars avoid proprietary DT frameworks (e.g., Siemens MindSphere, PTC ThingWorx), opting for **ad-hoc** implementations with open-source tools (e.g., InfluxDB, ActiveMQ, GitHub).
  - **Interoperability**:
    - **Message Brokers**: **ActiveMQ** (GreenhouseDT) and **Azure tools** (Air Quality Management) facilitate cross-system communication, though no standardized protocols (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) are explicitly mentioned.
    - **Hardware Abstraction**: Use of **Raspberry Pi** and **virtual machines** suggests hardware-agnostic design, but no formal interoperability standards (e.g., IEEE 21451 for sensor networks) are referenced.
  - **Certification/Compliance Frameworks**: No mention of **ISO 19650** (BIM), **ISO 23247** (DT lifecycle), or other certification requirements. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar’s focus on **virus spread prevention** implies adherence to **health/safety standards** (e.g., WHO guidelines), but these are not technically specified.
  - **Data Standards**: **InfluxDB** (time-series) and **AutomationML** (modeling) are the closest to standardized data formats, but no metadata schemas (e.g., JSON-LD, RDF) or semantic interoperability frameworks (e.g., OWL ontologies) are described."
]
